ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Booking #123456
ham.body:
Hi Raj,

Thank you for booking with Air India. Here are your flight details:

• Flight: AI-123
• Date: 15 May 2026
• Departure: 10:15 AM from Delhi (DLH) – Gate 22
• Arrival: 12:45 PM at Mumbai (BOM)
• Seat: 12B (Aisle)
• Baggage: 1 checked (23 kg) + 1 carry‑on (7 kg)

Check‑in opens 3 hours before departure. Use the QR code below to skip the lines.

For any changes or assistance, call us at +91‑11‑12345678 or email support@airindia.com.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
Air India Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Reminder
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are well. Our records show that your QuickBooks invoice (Invoice #QB987654) for the period 01/04/2026 – 30/04/2026 is still outstanding. Please note that QuickBooks requires timely payments to keep your account active.

Kripya is link par click karke payment complete karein: <URL>

If payment is not received within 5 business days, your QuickBooks account will be suspended, and you may lose access to your financial data. This is a mandatory security measure to protect your business.

Should you have already made the payment, kindly ignore this notice. For any queries, contact QuickBooks Support at +1‑800‑123‑4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
QuickBooks Support Team
